title: taraxacum pugiunculum
intro: Taraxacum pugiunculum, also known as the dwarf dandelion or miniature dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum pugiunculum include supporting digestive health, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Taraxacum pugiunculum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
